positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial dreamscape designed for fabric printing. The composition features a central, sweeping crescent moon intertwined with a delicate constellation of geometric stars (like connected points or thin lines). Scattered around the moon are stylized, translucent nebula swirls in deep sapphire blue, ethereal lavender, and shimmering teal. Include abstract, symmetrical elements like stylized comet trails and crescent plant forms (e.g., stylized fern fronds). The style should be 'Art Nouveau meets modern Nordic minimalism'—clean lines, strong negative space, and an elegant, dreamy mood. High contrast, flat graphic style, suitable for dark background prints. Flat vector illustration quality, symmetrical composition, deep jewel tones, concept art, highly detailed, high resolution, 4K, seamless pattern potential.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, noise, realistic, photorealistic, messy, cluttered, grayscale
